Both brains agree the market is sideways-distributing with a Fear & Greed of 33 and fading momentum, but the 78.7% bottom analog and stablecoin divergence argue for patience rather than new risk, so HOLD is the only coherent signal until price confirms a directional break.
disagreements_noted: Analyst called Anxiety (+1 adjacent) while the score-band anchor is Denial; I'm overriding to Denial because the analyst's own reasoning admits confusion and a 0/16 track record on direction calls.
